title: Listening Session on Bering Strait Incident Response – 2/17 at 11am
summary: As seasonal sea ice diminishes and vessel traffic increases, the Bering Strait region’s natural resources, habitat, and people are at greater risk from potential oil spills or other accidents. title: A Dry Duffle Bag That Can Handle Barnacles and Brown Bears
summary: Gear Editor Bjorn Dihle used to go through multiple dry bags each year, but this is his new go-to dry duffle. The post A Dry Duffle Bag That Can Handle Barnacles and Brown Bears appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
